This is a sample text file for testing the personal_kb ingest pipeline.

A knowledge base is a centralized repository of information that can be searched
and queried by users or automated agents. In this project, we build a local
knowledge base powered by Copilot CLI.

Key concepts:
- Agent-first design: the knowledge base is designed to be used by AI agents
- Local-first: all data stays on your machine
- Markdown output: all ingested content is converted to searchable Markdown

This file contains the keyword "knowledge base" which should be findable
via the /query command using ripgrep.
